issues.description: First effect triggers on life card removal, not generic 'Activated'. Should be 'OnLifeRemoved' or similar custom trigger for life card events.
Missing condition: 'If you have 7 or less cards in your hand' must be represented as a hand count condition.
First effect has '[Your Turn]' in text, requiring duration:'DuringYourTurn', not omitted/Permanent.
Second effect states '[On Your Opponent's Attack]', trigger should be 'OnAttack' with opponent scope, not 'Activated'.
Action uses legacy alias 'TrashFromHand' which maps to 'ForceDiscard'; however, context is optional ('You may trash'), requiring conditional/optional action structure.
Duration 'EndOfTurn' correct for 'during this turn', but second effect lacks '[Your Turn]' scope marker in original text—verify scope is opponent attack context.
